tasks.title: Build shared StageSlide scaffold + stageTimeline + act2Stages data, and register Act 2 column in App.tsx with 5 scaffold slides
tasks.description:
## Goal
Land the reusable layout primitive, fragment variants, and typed data for Act 2 so the five polish tasks (slides 6–10) can run in parallel without touching shared files. After this task, opening `http://localhost:5173/#/1/0` must show slide 6 (Привабити) with a working stage badge, 5-dot progress strip, and 3-fragment reveal (question → leak → mini-case), rendering the copy from the project plan. All five Act 2 slides must navigate correctly via keyboard.

## Context
Act 2 · Teaching covers slides 6–10 per `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md`. Each slide shares the same skeleton and differs only in: stage index (1–5), emoji, stage label, diagnostic question, leak sentence, and mini-case card copy. Polish tasks will add one slide-specific visual accent each. This task builds that skeleton once.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — brand tokens, Ukrainian copy rules, fragment authoring convention, React 19 `useState(() => ...)` lazy init rule.
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — the Act 2 table (slides 6–10) and the shared pattern paragraph.
3. `src/slides/02-Problem.tsx` + `src/animations/problemTimeline.ts` — reference for fragment-gated multi-stage slides.
4. `src/App.tsx` — see how Act 1 and Act 3 columns are structured. The new `act-teach` column inserts between `act-intro` and `act-cases`.
5. `src/engine/types.ts` — `SlideConfig` and `SlideProps` contracts.

## Files to create

### `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`
Layout primitive. Dumb presentational wrapper — takes content via props, not children.

API:
```ts
export interface StageSlideData {
  stageIndex: 1 | 2 | 3 | 4 | 5
  stageLabel: string         // e.g. "Привабити"
  emoji: string              // e.g. "👁"
  diagnosticQ: string        // fragment ≥ 0 reveal
  leak: string               // fragment ≥ 1 reveal
  caseClient: string         // bold line inside case card
  caseLocation?: string      // optional dim sub-line
  caseResult: string         // the hard-number line
  caseTechChips?: string[]   // small tech/tool chips in the case card footer
}

export interface StageSlideProps {
  data: StageSlideData
  isActive: boolean
  fragment: number
  /** Optional slot for a slide-specific visual accent placed above or beside the case card. */
  accent?: React.ReactNode
}
```

Visual layout:
- Full-bleed dark background (`SpaceBackdrop` or solid `#053345`) — pick what matches slides 3/4 so Act 1 → Act 2 feels continuous.
- **Top-left:** number badge showing `{stageIndex}/5` in Unbounded 600, cyan-300, with the stage emoji beside it and the stage label below in Poppins 500. Example: `👁 Привабити · 1/5`.
- **Top-right:** 5-dot progress strip. Dot 1..stageIndex filled cyan-400 (current one with a subtle glow), remaining dots hollow cyan-800 outline. Dot size ≈ 10px, gap ≈ 14px. Labels below each dot in a tiny caption style — hide on mobile.
- **Body left-middle:** the diagnostic question, Unbounded 700, size `clamp(2.2rem, 4vw, 3.4rem)`, line-height 1.15, in quotes «…», color `#F0F4F8`, max-width ~18ch. Shown when `isActive && fragment >= 0` (so always, once the slide is active).
- **Body center:** the leak line. Poppins 400, color `rgba(240,244,248,0.78)`, size `clamp(1.05rem, 1.5vw, 1.3rem)`, prefaced with a thin cyan-400 horizontal rule and a small ⚠ icon. Shown when `fragment >= 1`.
- **Bottom:** mini-case card. Rounded 2xl, subtle border `1px solid rgba(83,234,253,0.18)`, background `rgba(10, 40, 56, 0.6)`, padding `p-6 md:p-8`, max-width 60ch, centered. Inside: `caseClient` in Poppins 600, `caseLocation` in Poppins 400 dim, `caseResult` in Unbounded 600 cyan-300 (the hard number sits here), and `caseTechChips` as small rounded chips with `bg-cyan-900/60 border-cyan-700/40 text-cyan-200 text-xs px-2 py-1`. Shown when `fragment >= 2`.
- **Accent slot:** rendered beside the case card on desktop (right column) or above it on mobile. Task 1 leaves this unused; polish tasks fill it.

All reveals use the variants from `src/animations/stageTimeline.ts` (next file). Gate every animated element on `isActive && fragment >= K` exactly like `src/slides/02-Problem.tsx` does — `const stage = (t: number) => (isActive && fragment >= t) ? 'visible' : 'hidden'`.

Keep the component under ~140 lines. If it grows, extract the progress strip into a small internal `<ProgressStrip stageIndex={...} />` helper in the same file.

### `src/animations/stageTimeline.ts`
Export Framer Motion `Variants` for:
- `stageQuestion` — `hidden: { opacity: 0, y: 24, filter: 'blur(6px)' }` → `visible: { opacity: 1, y: 0, filter: 'blur(0)', transition: { duration: 0.7, ease: easeSmooth, delay: 0.15 } }`.
- `stageLeak` — fade-in + slide-up, delay 0.1s, duration 0.5s.
- `caseCardEnter` — fade-in + slight scale from 0.96 + subtle y-translate, duration 0.6s with spring; stagger children (client → result → chips) by 0.08s.
- `caseCardChildren` — container variants for the stagger.
- `progressDot` (optional) — `hidden: { opacity: 0.4 }` → `visible: { opacity: 1, scale: [1, 1.18, 1] }` for a single pulse on the active dot. Use `transition: { duration: 0.8 }`; do NOT loop.
- Import `easeSmooth` from `./transitions`.

### `src/data/act2Stages.ts`
Typed const export:
```ts
import type { StageSlideData } from '@/components/StageSlide'

export const ACT2_STAGES: readonly StageSlideData[] = [
  {
    stageIndex: 1,
    stageLabel: 'Привабити',
    emoji: '👁',
    diagnosticQ: '«Звідки приходить ваш наступний клієнт?»',
    leak: 'Більшість малих бізнесів інвестують в Insta / Ads наосліп.',
    caseClient: 'LR Health & Beauty',
    caseLocation: 'Майнц · DE+RU',
    caseResult: '23K підписників TikTok → автоматична воронка, 15–25 Reels / тиждень.',
    caseTechChips: ['TikTok', 'InVideo AI', 'GoHighLevel'],
  },
  // slide 7 Зацікавити, slide 8 Записати, slide 9 Обслужити, slide 10 Повернути …
] as const
```
Fill in all 5 stages with the copy from the PROJECT_PLAN.md Act 2 table VERBATIM. Ukrainian copy rules apply — apostrophes are **U+02BC ʼ** (not ASCII `'`) and quotation marks are **«…»**. Do not translate brand names (LR Health & Beauty, Küchen Fokus, Magento, Auto Eder, etc.).

For slides 7, 8, 9, 10 where the plan marks numbers `[TBD]`: keep `[TBD]` visible in `caseResult`. Do not invent numbers. Polish tasks will leave the placeholder visible per the 'don't invent content' rule in `CLAUDE.md`.

### `src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx` through `src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx`
One file per slide. Each ~25 lines:
```tsx
import { StageSlide } from '@/components/StageSlide'
import { ACT2_STAGES } from '@/data/act2Stages'
import type { SlideProps } from '@/engine/types'

export function AttractStageSlide({ isActive, fragment }: SlideProps) {
  return <StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[0]} isActive={isActive} fragment={fragment} />
}
```
Export names: `AttractStageSlide`, `InterestStageSlide`, `BookStageSlide`, `ServeStageSlide`, `RetainStageSlide`. These mirror the stage labels in English to match the existing `HeroSlide`/`ProblemSlide` convention.

## Files to modify

### `src/App.tsx`
Insert a new column **between** `act-intro` and `act-cases`:
```ts
{
  id: 'act-teach',
  slides: [
    { id: 'attract',  component: AttractStageSlide,  title: 'Привабити',  fragments: 2, showCenterLogo: false, background: 'transparent', notes: '...' },
    { id: 'interest', component: InterestStageSlide, title: 'Зацікавити', fragments: 2, showCenterLogo: false, background: 'transparent', notes: '...' },
    { id: 'book',     component: BookStageSlide,     title: 'Записати',   fragments: 2, showCenterLogo: false, background: 'transparent', notes: '...' },
    { id: 'serve',    component: ServeStageSlide,    title: 'Обслужити',  fragments: 2, showCenterLogo: false, background: 'transparent', notes: '...' },
    { id: 'retain',   component: RetainStageSlide,   title: 'Повернути',  fragments: 2, showCenterLogo: false, background: 'transparent', notes: '...' },
  ],
}
```

`notes` content for each slide must match the narration from the project plan — each one short (2–4 lines), focused on what Oleksandr says during that slide. Example for Привабити: `'Діагностичне питання: звідки приходить наступний клієнт? | Leak: Insta/Ads наосліп. | Міні-кейс LR — TikTok воронка, 15–25 Reels/тиждень.'`.

Remove the TODO comment `// TODO batch 2: add hook slide ...` **only if** slides 2 and 5 are in scope — for this task they are NOT, so leave that comment alone.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (Act 2 section), `src/slides/02-Problem.tsx`, `src/animations/problemTimeline.ts`, `src/App.tsx`, `src/engine/types.ts`.
2. Author `src/animations/stageTimeline.ts` with the variants listed above.
3. Author `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` implementing the layout. Internal `<ProgressStrip />` helper is fine. No WebGL, no ReactBits — this is Tailwind + Framer Motion only.
4. Author `src/data/act2Stages.ts` with all 5 stages, verbatim copy from the project plan, Ukrainian typography rules observed.
5. Author the 5 scaffold slide files (`06-AttractStage.tsx` ... `10-RetainStage.tsx`), each a ~25-line wrapper.
6. Update `src/App.tsx` — add imports for the 5 new slides, add the `act-teach` column between `act-intro` and `act-cases`. Fill `notes` for each entry.
7. Run the exit gate below.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` — must exit 0 with zero diagnostics. Paste the output.
- `npx eslint src/components/StageSlide.tsx src/animations/stageTimeline.ts src/data/act2Stages.ts src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx src/App.tsx` — must exit 0. (Scoped lint per CLAUDE.md — do NOT `npm run lint`, it has pre-existing errors in `src/engine/*`.)
- `npm run build` — must exit 0.
- `npm run dev` (if not already running) then `curl -sS http://localhost:5173/ | head -5` — confirm the dev server responds.
- Chrome DevTools MCP manual checks (run these, paste results):
  1. `new_page` → `http://localhost:5173/#/1/0` — must show slide 6 (Привабити). Take screenshot at 1920×1080.
  2. Navigate via hash to `/#/1/0/1` → leak visible, then `/#/1/0/2` → case card visible.
  3. Navigate to `/#/1/1` through `/#/1/4` — each shows the correct stage (Зацікавити, Записати, Обслужити, Повернути) with progress dot lit at the right index.
  4. `list_console_messages` on each — zero errors, zero warnings.
  5. Resize to 375×667 on slide 6 + fragment 2 — case card + progress strip readable, no horizontal overflow.

## Definition of Done

- `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/animations/stageTimeline.ts`, `src/data/act2Stages.ts`, and the 5 scaffold slide files all exist and are under their respective target sizes (140 / 80 / 80 / 30 lines each).
- `src/App.tsx` registers a new `act-teach` column between Act 1 and Act 3 with 5 slide entries, each with `fragments: 2` and filled `notes`.
- All 5 slides render correctly end-to-end with only the foundation task's code — no polish needed to make them presentable.
- Copy in `act2Stages.ts` uses Ukrainian typography (U+02BC apostrophe, «» guillemets) and the exact phrasing from `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` Act 2 table.
- `tsc --noEmit`, scoped `eslint`, and `npm run build` all exit 0.
- Dev server serves all 5 slides at `#/1/0` through `#/1/4`, fragment nav works, progress strip lights the correct dot, no console errors at either viewport.
- The foundation task does not modify slides 1, 3, 4 or the Act 1 / Act 3 / Act 4 columns.

tasks.title: Slide 6 · Привабити — polish with TikTok / 23K reels accent
tasks.description:
## Goal
Turn the scaffold `src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx` into a polished opening Act 2 slide that lands the LR Health & Beauty TikTok story hard enough that the audience remembers the number 23K. The slide must teach the stage diagnostic question «Звідки приходить ваш наступний клієнт?», surface the investing-blind leak, and make the case numeric — not decorative.

## Context
This is slide 6 of 24 — the first teaching slide after the Framework intro (slide 5). It opens Act 2. The audience has just been asked to locate themselves on the 5-stage journey; Привабити (Attract) is the first stage.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — brand tokens + ReactBits discipline (`-tw` variant, always retheme cyan, one accent per slide max).
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — Act 2 row for slide 6 (Привабити).
3. `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` — the layout primitive. DO NOT modify it. Only pass props + accent.
4. `src/data/act2Stages.ts` — confirm `ACT2_STAGES[0]` holds the right copy. Touch this file only if copy changes.
5. `src/components/AnimatedCounter.tsx` — reuse for the 23K count-up.

## What changes

### `src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx`
Replace the bare-bones wrapper from Task 1 with a version that renders a slide-specific `accent` node passed to `StageSlide`. Do NOT rewrite layout; the accent node simply supplies the visual.

The accent is a compact composition placed to the right of the case card on desktop, above it on mobile:
1. A stylized **TikTok-colored gradient badge** (cyan-400 → cyan-200 → off-white — DO NOT use real TikTok pink/cyan — adapt to our cyan palette) containing an animated count-up from 0 → 23,000 with the `AnimatedCounter` component, suffix `'+'`, then the caption «підписників» underneath in Poppins 400.
2. A 3-up grid of **reel thumbnail mockups** — small rounded rectangles (aspect-ratio 9:16), backgrounds `rgba(255,255,255,0.04)`, with faint cyan-300 border + a small ▶ icon in the center. No real imagery; these are suggestive only.
3. A one-line caption below the grid: «15–25 Reels / тиждень» in Poppins 500 cyan-200.

Gate the entire accent on `isActive && fragment >= 2` — it appears with the case card, not before. Use `stageQuestion` / `caseCardEnter` variants from `stageTimeline.ts`, or add one new variant `reelsAccent` in the same file if needed.

Optionally (if you can do it without exceeding the one-accent-per-slide rule) add a subtle `BlurHighlight` on the word «TikTok» inside the case card via `ACT2_STAGES[0].caseResult` — this one text-effect is already installed (`src/components/react-bits/blur-highlight.tsx`) and used on slide 3. If adding it requires modifying shared data, skip it instead — this is a slide polish task, not a data rewrite.

### No other files
Do NOT modify `StageSlide.tsx`, `stageTimeline.ts`, `act2Stages.ts`, `App.tsx`, or any other slide. If you find a bug in the scaffold, flag it in the report instead of patching it — fixes belong in a separate task.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (slide 6 row), `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/components/AnimatedCounter.tsx`, `src/components/react-bits/blur-highlight.tsx`.
2. Build the accent subtree as an internal helper inside `06-AttractStage.tsx` (e.g., `function AttractAccent({ active }: { active: boolean })`). Use only Tailwind cyan-* classes and Framer Motion.
3. Wire `AnimatedCounter` with `target={23000}`, `suffix='+'`, `active={active}`, `duration={1.8}`, `delay={0.2}`.
4. Compose the 3-thumbnail mock grid with plain Tailwind. Add a very subtle motion (scale 0.96 → 1 on stagger) so the grid doesn't land static.
5. Pass the accent node to `<StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[0]} isActive={isActive} fragment={fragment} accent={<AttractAccent active={isActive && fragment >= 2} />} />`.
6. Verify the accent is suppressed at fragments 0 and 1, appears on fragment 2, and does not cause horizontal overflow at 375×667.
7. Run the exit gate below.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` — zero diagnostics.
- `npx eslint src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx` — zero errors.
- `npm run build` — exits 0.
- Chrome DevTools MCP:
  1. `new_page` → `http://localhost:5173/#/1/0/0` — stage badge + progress strip + question visible, accent NOT visible. Screenshot 1920×1080.
  2. `/#/1/0/1` — leak line appears. Accent still NOT visible.
  3. `/#/1/0/2` — case card appears AND the 23K count-up + reels grid appear together. Screenshot 1920×1080 and 375×667.
  4. `list_console_messages` — zero errors.
  5. Inspect screenshot at 1920×1080: confirm the accent is right-aligned with the case card and not overlapping it. At 375×667: confirm the accent stacks above the case card.
- Verify `AnimatedCounter` terminates at exactly 23000 (not 22999), then idles — no infinite loop.
- Verify `prefers-reduced-motion` behavior: the counter should jump to 23000 immediately (test with DevTools emulation if available, otherwise inspect `AnimatedCounter`'s `reduce` branch to confirm it handles this).

## Definition of Done

- Slide 6 at `#/1/0` renders the Привабити stage with all three fragments working: Q (0) → leak (1) → case + accent (2).
- The accent contains a count-up to 23,000 using `AnimatedCounter`, a 3-thumbnail reel mock grid, and the «15–25 Reels / тиждень» caption — all themed in cyan, never TikTok pink/magenta.
- Accent is gated on fragment ≥ 2 and never appears earlier.
- Only `src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx` is modified. `StageSlide.tsx`, `stageTimeline.ts`, `act2Stages.ts`, and `App.tsx` are untouched.
- `tsc --noEmit`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build` all exit 0; no console errors at either viewport.
- Screenshots at 1920×1080 + 375×667 for fragments 0, 1, 2 are captured and attached to the report.

tasks.title: Slide 7 · Зацікавити — polish with brand-in-6-weeks + Olga-Gatlin reference accent
tasks.description:
## Goal
Polish the scaffold `src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx` into a slide that makes «6 тижнів від нуля до бренду + сайт» feel tangible. The Küchen Fokus case is about clarity and trust in the first 5 seconds of a site visit — the accent should visualise speed and brand completeness, not show real screenshots (the asset isn't shipped yet).

## Context
Slide 7 of 24. Second teaching slide (Stage 2/5: Зацікавити). Leads with the diagnostic question «Що бачить клієнт за перші 5 секунд на вашому сайті?». The leak is «Якщо не зрозуміло «що ви робите» і «чому вам довіряти» — він пішов». The case is Küchen Fokus with a placeholder `[TBD]` on the leads-increase number plus a voiceover mention of Olga Gatlin's trilingual site work.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — brand tokens + «6 тижнів» must be rendered with Unbounded (display face) to carry weight.
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — slide 7 row.
3. `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` — layout primitive (do not modify).
4. `src/data/act2Stages.ts` — confirm `ACT2_STAGES[1]` (Зацікавити).

## What changes

### `src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx`
Replace the scaffold with a version that passes an `accent` node to `StageSlide`.

The accent is a **6-week timeline ribbon** — a thin horizontal strip (or vertical on mobile) with 6 equal stops, each representing one week. Each stop shows a tiny label of what lands that week:
1. Бренд
2. Контент
3. Макет
4. Розробка
5. QA
6. Запуск

Stop dots are cyan-400 filled, connector line is cyan-700. Labels in Poppins 400, tiny (0.75rem), cyan-200. At the far right of the timeline, a pill badge reading «6 тижнів» in Unbounded 600 cyan-300 with a subtle pulse (`scale: [1, 1.05, 1]` one-shot).

Below the ribbon, a one-line voiceover hint styled as a small quoted note: `«Olga Gatlin: 3 мови, клієнти з трьох країн»` in Poppins 400 italic, `rgba(240,244,248,0.55)`, tiny — this is Oleksandr's prompt to himself to voice that during narration.

Gate on `isActive && fragment >= 2`.

Do NOT include a fake kitchen screenshot — per `CLAUDE.md` the «don't ship with placeholder images still visible in production» rule applies. The 6-stop timeline IS the visual — no photo needed.

### Optional — strikethrough demo
If the accent needs more visual weight, add a tiny row above the ribbon reading «Звичайний цикл: 3–6 місяців» with a strikethrough, then the ribbon labelled «Ми: 6 тижнів». Keep it under 2 lines total.

### No other files
Do NOT modify `StageSlide.tsx`, `stageTimeline.ts`, `act2Stages.ts`, `App.tsx`.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (slide 7 row), `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/data/act2Stages.ts`.
2. Implement the `InterestAccent` helper inside `07-InterestStage.tsx`. Use pure Tailwind + Framer Motion, no ReactBits, no WebGL.
3. Use `stageQuestion` / `caseCardEnter` variants or add a small `weekRibbon` variant locally — stagger the 6 stops by 0.08s starting 0.3s after case card enters.
4. Verify the «6 тижнів» pill uses Unbounded 600 via the `--font-display` CSS var or inline `fontFamily`.
5. Verify the voiceover line renders but is small and dim — an `<aside>` with `role="note"` is appropriate.
6. Pass the accent node to `<StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[1]} ... accent={<InterestAccent active={isActive && fragment >= 2} />} />`.
7. Run the exit gate.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` — zero diagnostics.
- `npx eslint src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx` — zero errors.
- `npm run build` — exits 0.
- Chrome DevTools MCP:
  1. `#/1/1/0` — stage 2/5 progress dot lit, question visible, accent NOT visible. Screenshot 1920×1080.
  2. `#/1/1/1` — leak appears.
  3. `#/1/1/2` — case card + timeline ribbon + pill appear. Screenshot 1920×1080 + 375×667.
  4. `list_console_messages` — zero errors.
  5. Screenshot at 375×667 — confirm the 6-stop ribbon either stays horizontal (shrunk labels) or switches to vertical. Either is acceptable — no overflow, labels still legible.
- Copy: confirm apostrophe U+02BC in «3 мови» is correct, guillemets on the voiceover note, no machine-translated Ukrainian.

## Definition of Done

- Slide 7 at `#/1/1` renders Зацікавити with 3 fragments working. Progress strip dot 2/5 lit.
- Accent is a 6-week timeline ribbon with «6 тижнів» pill in Unbounded, plus a dim italic voiceover line about Olga Gatlin.
- The `[TBD]` in `caseResult` is still visible (project plan says so — do NOT invent a number).
- Only `src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx` modified.
- `tsc`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build` clean. Screenshots at both viewports, all 3 fragments. Zero console errors.

tasks.title: Slide 8 · Записати — polish with 24/7 clock ring + 11 PM «missed-message» scenario
tasks.description:
## Goal
Polish `src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx` into a slide that viscerally sells «запис 24/7» — the diagnostic question is deliberately timed: «Як легко записатись до вас прямо зараз, о 11 вечора?». The accent must make the audience feel that late-evening moment when a potential customer tries to reach out and either books or bounces.

## Context
Slide 8 of 24. Stage 3/5: Записати (Book). Mini-case: Nail Salon (Munich, anonymous) — запис 24/7, автонагадування, [TBD]% менше пропущених візитів.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — Ukrainian copy rules (the number 23:00 in UA = «11 вечора» — keep the vernacular form).
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — slide 8 row.
3. `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` — layout primitive.
4. `src/data/act2Stages.ts` — `ACT2_STAGES[2]`.

## What changes

### `src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx`
Replace scaffold with a version supplying an accent.

The accent is a **clock-face ring** — a circular SVG dial sized ~220px on desktop / ~140px on mobile:
- Outer ring: cyan-700 thin stroke.
- 12 tick marks at hour positions.
- Two tinted arcs showing «business hours» (e.g., 9:00–19:00) in dim cyan-900 and «after-hours» (19:00–9:00) in cyan-400 with a subtle glow — visually emphasising that the 24/7 system covers BOTH.
- A clock hand pointing at 23:00 (11 PM), the minute hand at 12. Use a subtle one-shot rotation on mount (from 12:00 → 23:00, eased) to draw attention to the late hour.
- Below the dial: a chip reading «24 / 7» in Unbounded 700 cyan-300.
- Next to the chip, tiny text: «Клієнт пише — система відповідає» in Poppins 400.

Gate on `isActive && fragment >= 2`.

The mini-case card (handled by `StageSlide`) already shows the Nail Salon copy with the `[TBD]%` placeholder — do NOT touch that. The accent focuses on the 24/7 concept; the case provides the proof.

### No other files
Only `src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx`.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (slide 8 row), `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/data/act2Stages.ts`.
2. Implement a small `ClockDialAccent` helper inside `08-BookStage.tsx`. Use a single inline SVG — no dependency on a clock library.
3. Animate the hour hand rotation: `rotate: 0 → 330deg` (11 PM) once, with `duration: 1.6s`, `ease: easeSmooth`, starting 0.4s after fragment 2 activates. Respect `useReducedMotion` — if reduced, snap to 330deg with no transition.
4. The after-hours arc uses a radial-gradient stroke or a semi-transparent cyan-400 fill at 0.3 opacity to read as ambient light, not a full solid ring.
5. Pass to `<StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[2]} ... accent={<ClockDialAccent active={...} />} />`.
6. Run the exit gate.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.
- `npx eslint src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx` clean.
- `npm run build` exits 0.
- Chrome DevTools MCP:
  1. `#/1/2/0` — stage 3/5 dot lit, Q visible, accent NOT visible.
  2. `#/1/2/1` — leak visible.
  3. `#/1/2/2` — clock dial accent appears; hour hand animates to 11 PM position; 24/7 chip visible. Screenshot 1920×1080 + 375×667.
  4. `list_console_messages` — zero errors.
- Verify the clock hand ends pointing at the 11 o'clock position (slightly past vertical to the left, upper-left quadrant). Visually confirm in the screenshot.
- Verify with `prefers-reduced-motion` emulation (if possible) that the hand snaps instead of rotating.

## Definition of Done

- Slide 8 at `#/1/2` renders Записати with 3 working fragments. Progress dot 3/5 lit.
- Accent is a cyan-themed 24/7 clock dial with an animated hand to 11 PM + a «24/7» Unbounded chip.
- Dial honours reduced-motion preference.
- Only `src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx` is modified.
- `tsc`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build` clean. Screenshots at both viewports, all 3 fragments. Zero console errors.

tasks.title: Slide 9 · Обслужити — polish with Magento + ERP throughput accent (anonymised, credibility > transparency)
tasks.description:
## Goal
Polish `src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx` into a slide about operational leverage — «вдвічі більше клієнтів без вдвічі більшої команди». Auto Eder is the case; the tech chips (Magento 2, ERP) must read as chosen-for-this-job, not logo soup. The `[TBD]×` throughput multiplier is visible (not invented).

## Context
Slide 9 of 24. Stage 4/5: Обслужити (Serve). Diagnostic Q: «Чи можете ви обслужити вдвічі більше клієнтів без вдвічі більшої команди?». Leak: «Хаос замовлень, ручні рахунки — зростання коштує якості». Case: Auto Eder — Magento 2 + ERP — [TBD]× замовлень на ту саму команду. Per `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md`: «No price shown (credibility > transparency).»

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — brand tokens, ReactBits discipline (stay in cyan).
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — slide 9 row.
3. `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` — layout primitive (do not modify).
4. `src/data/act2Stages.ts` — `ACT2_STAGES[3]`.

## What changes

### `src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx`
Accent concept: a **throughput visualisation** showing two bars side-by-side.
- Left bar: labelled «Раніше», short (e.g., 40% of available width), cyan-800 fill.
- Right bar: labelled «Тепер», longer (bar fills to 85–90%), cyan-400 → cyan-300 gradient with a subtle glow.
- Bars grow from 0 to their target width on fragment 2 activation, staggered by 0.2s.
- Above the bars: the label «Замовлень / тиждень» in Poppins 500 cyan-200.
- To the right of the longer bar: a pill reading «[TBD]× більше» in Unbounded 600 cyan-300. Keep `[TBD]` literally — project plan forbids inventing numbers.
- Below the bars: two tiny chips reading «Magento 2» and «ERP» in Poppins 400 cyan-200 on `bg-cyan-900/60 border-cyan-700/40 rounded-full` capsules.

Gate the accent on `isActive && fragment >= 2`.

### No other files
Only `src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx`.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (slide 9 row), `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/data/act2Stages.ts`.
2. Implement `ThroughputAccent` helper. Bars are plain `<motion.div>` with `animate={{ width: ... }}` or width via `scaleX` on a fixed-width track (scaleX is cheaper for GPU; prefer it).
3. Use `transform-origin: left` so `scaleX: 0 → 0.4` and `0 → 0.87` reads as bars filling from left.
4. Stagger: 0.1s for the smaller bar, 0.4s for the larger one. Each transition 0.9s with `easeSmooth`.
5. Verify the `[TBD]×` pill is visually anchored to the end of the longer bar at desktop widths and stacks below on mobile.
6. Pass to `<StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[3]} ... accent={<ThroughputAccent active={...} />} />`.
7. Run the exit gate.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.
- `npx eslint src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx` clean.
- `npm run build` exits 0.
- Chrome DevTools MCP:
  1. `#/1/3/0` — stage 4/5 dot lit, Q visible, accent NOT visible.
  2. `#/1/3/1` — leak visible.
  3. `#/1/3/2` — case card + bar chart accent. Screenshot 1920×1080 + 375×667.
  4. `list_console_messages` — zero errors.
  5. Verify that both bars land at their target widths (не анімуються назад) and remain static afterwards.
  6. Verify the accent does not overflow at 375×667 — bars may need `max-width: 260px` on mobile.
- Copy: confirm Magento 2 / ERP chip ordering and Ukrainian labels match the plan.

## Definition of Done

- Slide 9 at `#/1/3` renders Обслужити with 3 working fragments. Progress dot 4/5 lit.
- Accent is a 2-bar throughput chart (Раніше vs Тепер) with a `[TBD]× більше` pill and Magento / ERP chips — all in cyan.
- `[TBD]` placeholder stays visible; no invented multiplier.
- Only `src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx` is modified.
- `tsc`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build` clean. Screenshots at both viewports, all 3 fragments. Zero console errors.

tasks.title: Slide 10 · Повернути — polish with 4-email-sequence grid + 5× cost callout
tasks.description:
## Goal
Polish `src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx` into the closing Act 2 slide. The stage is Повернути (Retain) — the diagnostic Q «Скільки ваших клієнтів повертаються? Ви знаєте точно чи здогадуєтесь?» frames the question about measurement. The leak «Залучити нового — у 5× дорожче, ніж повернути старого» is the hard-number industry fact. The case is LR email nurture — 4 послідовності (DE/RU × продукт/партнерство), 5–7 листів кожна.

## Context
Slide 10 of 24. Stage 5/5: Повернути. After this slide, the Act 3 section divider (slide 11) opens. So this slide must resolve Act 2 cleanly — no new thread left open; the progress strip is fully lit for the first time.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — brand tokens.
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — slide 10 row.
3. `src/components/StageSlide.tsx` — layout primitive (do not modify).
4. `src/data/act2Stages.ts` — `ACT2_STAGES[4]`.

## What changes

### `src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx`
Accent concept: a **2×2 grid of email sequence cards**, each representing one nurture stream.

Four cards, each ~140×100px desktop / full-width stacked on mobile:
1. «DE · Продукт» · 5–7 листів
2. «DE · Партнерство» · 5–7 листів
3. «RU · Продукт» · 5–7 листів
4. «RU · Партнерство» · 5–7 листів

Each card:
- Rounded-xl, `bg-cyan-900/40 border-cyan-700/30`.
- Top-left: a tiny language flag emoji or language code badge («DE» / «RU» in a small cyan-300 mono pill). NEVER use real flag emojis 🇩🇪🇷🇺 — they're inconsistent cross-platform; use text pills.
- Middle: the topic label («Продукт» / «Партнерство») in Poppins 500 off-white.
- Bottom-right: «5–7 листів» in Poppins 400 cyan-200, tiny.
- Left edge: a vertical stack of 5–7 tiny horizontal bars (like email stacking icons) in cyan-400 at 0.6 opacity, staggered height.

Cards appear on fragment 2, staggered 0.08s each.

Above the grid, a single strong line: «5× дорожче залучити, ніж повернути» in Unbounded 700 cyan-300. This echoes the leak but reframes it as the rationale for the 4 sequences. Make it feel like a headline, not another bullet.

Gate the whole accent on `isActive && fragment >= 2`.

### No other files
Only `src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx`.

## Steps

1. Read `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` (slide 10 row), `src/components/StageSlide.tsx`, `src/data/act2Stages.ts`.
2. Implement `RetainAccent` helper. Use Tailwind grid: `grid-cols-2 gap-3` on desktop, `grid-cols-1` on mobile via responsive classes.
3. Stagger card entries using a container variant with `staggerChildren: 0.08`, `delayChildren: 0.3`.
4. Verify the 5× callout uses Unbounded and stands out visually from the case card below it.
5. Pass to `<StageSlide data={ACT2_STAGES[4]} ... accent={<RetainAccent active={...} />} />`.
6. Run the exit gate.

## Testing

- `npx tsc --noEmit` clean.
- `npx eslint src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx` clean.
- `npm run build` exits 0.
- Chrome DevTools MCP:
  1. `#/1/4/0` — stage 5/5 dot lit (progress strip fully filled for the first time in the deck). Screenshot 1920×1080 to confirm. Q visible, accent NOT visible.
  2. `#/1/4/1` — leak visible.
  3. `#/1/4/2` — case card + 4-email-grid accent + 5× callout. Screenshot 1920×1080 + 375×667.
  4. `list_console_messages` — zero errors.
  5. Verify that the 4 cards are clearly distinct (DE × 2, RU × 2) — the language-code pill is readable at both viewports.
  6. Verify the 5× callout reads as a headline, not as another bullet in the case card.
- Copy: confirm apostrophes U+02BC, guillemets «» in all sub-copy.

## Definition of Done

- Slide 10 at `#/1/4` renders Повернути with 3 working fragments. Progress strip fully lit (5/5 dots).
- Accent is a 2×2 grid of 4 nurture-sequence cards + a Unbounded «5× дорожче залучити» callout.
- Card language codes use text pills, not flag emojis.
- Only `src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx` is modified.
- `tsc`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build` clean. Screenshots at both viewports, all 3 fragments. Zero console errors.

tasks.title: Act 2 full verification — visual review × 2 viewports, copy audit, fragment smoke test, type + lint + build gate
tasks.description:
## Goal
Confirm Act 2 (slides 6–10) ships as a cohesive block — the 5 slides read as one teaching beat with consistent rhythm and no regressions in Acts 1, 3, 4. This task runs AFTER the 6 build tasks (group 1 + group 2) have all reported done.

## Context
Every individual slide task has its own verification, but they each only see their own slide in isolation. This task sits above them and verifies the act-level properties: shared layout consistency, fragment-nav continuity across slides, copy quality, and that global gates (tsc, lint, build) still pass when everything is stitched together.

Read first:
1. `CLAUDE.md` — «Visual verification (Chrome DevTools MCP is configured)» section + «Lint scoping».
2. `docs/PROJECT_PLAN.md` — Act 2 table.

## Files to modify

None expected. Purpose is verification, not implementation. If regressions are found, file them as separate issues — do NOT fix in this task.

One exception: if slide `notes` strings in `src/App.tsx` are inconsistent in tone between slides (e.g., some are bullet lists, some are prose), normalize them to the shorter pipe-separated form Task 1 specified: `'Q: ... | Leak: ... | Case: ...'`. This is a minor polish, not scope creep.

## Steps

### Step 1 — Global gates
- `npx tsc --noEmit` — paste exact output; must exit 0.
- `npx eslint src/components/StageSlide.tsx src/animations/stageTimeline.ts src/data/act2Stages.ts src/slides/06-AttractStage.tsx src/slides/07-InterestStage.tsx src/slides/08-BookStage.tsx src/slides/09-ServeStage.tsx src/slides/10-RetainStage.tsx src/App.tsx` — paste output; must exit 0.
- `npm run build` — paste tail; must exit 0.

### Step 2 — Fragment-nav smoke test
- `mcp__chrome-devtools__new_page` → `http://localhost:5173/`.
- Navigate via keyboard (using `mcp__chrome-devtools__press_key`): from `/#/1/0/0` press Space → confirm hash becomes `/#/1/0/1` (leak reveals). Space again → `/#/1/0/2` (case reveals). Space again → `/#/1/1/2` per the retreat-to-last-fragment rule (engine behaviour from CLAUDE.md) OR `/#/1/1/0` if forward advance resets fragments — whichever the engine currently implements. Check and report which it is; do NOT change engine behaviour.
- Press ArrowLeft from `/#/1/1/0` — must land on `/#/1/0/2` (retreat into slide 6 at its last fragment, per CLAUDE.md engine rules).
- Repeat the forward walk across all 5 slides, then one forward beyond slide 10 — must advance to Act 3 cases-divider (`/#/2/0`).

### Step 3 — Screenshots
For each slide (6, 7, 8, 9, 10) at each fragment (0, 1, 2):
- `resize_page` 1920×1080, `take_screenshot`.
- `resize_page` 375×667, `take_screenshot`.
Total: 30 screenshots. Save artefact paths in report.

Review screenshots for:
- Consistent number-badge position (top-left) across all 5 slides.
- Consistent progress-strip position (top-right) and dot lighting matches stage index.
- Case card stays inside the safe zone at 375×667 — no horizontal overflow.
- Accent does not overlap the case card on any slide.
- Typography: question uses Unbounded display face, body uses Poppins.
- Colour: everything stays cyan — no accidental amber / magenta / yellow bleed from any shader or accent.

### Step 4 — Copy audit
- `grep -n "'" src/data/act2Stages.ts` — must return zero lines (apostrophe U+02BC is not ASCII `'`; no ASCII apostrophes should appear in Ukrainian copy). If lines appear, flag each.
- `grep -n '"' src/data/act2Stages.ts` — confirm Ukrainian quoted passages use «» not ASCII `"`.
- Verify `[TBD]` appears visibly on slides 7, 8, 9 (project plan has confirmed values ONLY for slide 6 and slide 10). Slide 6 must NOT have `[TBD]` visible.
- Verify brand names keep Latin spelling: LR Health & Beauty, Küchen Fokus, Nail Salon, Auto Eder, Magento 2, ERP.
- Verify no machine-translated feeling: acronyms in headlines are absent (project plan rule), tech chips OK.

### Step 5 — Console audit
For each of the 5 slides: `list_console_messages` after navigating to `#/1/0/2`, `#/1/1/2`, ..., `#/1/4/2`. Paste any warnings or errors. Zero is the pass bar.

### Step 6 — Acts 1, 3, 4 regression check
- Navigate to `#/0/0/0` (Hero) → screenshot + console check. Must be unchanged.
- Navigate to `#/0/1/0` (Problem) → `#/0/1/3` (all fragments) → confirm problem slide still works.
- Navigate to `#/0/2/0` (Solution) → `#/0/2/4` → confirm solution slide still works.
- Navigate to `#/2/0` (cases divider) and `#/3/0` (services grid) → confirm columns 2 and 3 still render. Column indices shifted by +1 with the new `act-teach` column — confirm this is reflected correctly in the engine's right-rail dots (5 column dots should show, not 3).

### Step 7 — Report
Report back a single Markdown block with:
- Status per slide (pass / fail / flagged).
- Any regression found in Acts 1/3/4 due to the new column.
- Exact artefact paths for all 30 screenshots.
- Full copy-audit output.
- Console-error summary.
- Any `[TBD]` items that still need numbers (expected: 7, 8, 9).
- A final verdict line: **PASS** if every sub-check green, **FAIL** with specific blockers otherwise. FAIL does not mean «implement fixes in this task» — it means «file each blocker to the user as the next item of work».

## Testing

This task IS testing. There is no `Testing` section separate from `Steps`.

## Definition of Done

- All 7 steps above executed and reported.
- 30 screenshots captured at 1920×1080 + 375×667, all 5 slides × all 3 fragments.
- Global gates (`tsc`, scoped `eslint`, `npm run build`) exit 0 with output pasted.
- Copy audit run, results reported.
- Console audit run, results reported.
- Regression sweep on Acts 1/3/4 done.
- Final verdict posted (PASS or FAIL with enumerated blockers).
- NO code changes in this task other than (optional) `notes` normalisation in `src/App.tsx`.
